title: ammannia coccinea subsp. purpurea
intro: Ammannia coccinea subsp. purpurea, also known as the purple ammannia, is a flowering plant species in the family Lythraceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include being a diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial agent. The health benefits of Ammannia coccinea subsp. purpurea include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate joint pain, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
